title: fuse-overlayfs bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[1.16-1]
- update to https://github.com/containers/fuse-overlayfs/releases/tag/v1.16
- fixes 'Update fuse-overlayfs to 1.16 [rhel-10.1.z]'
- Resolves: RHEL-128522
